# Grammar Checker

> Free AI grammar checker & proofreader. BYOK — supports DeepSeek, Gemini, GLM, Kimi.
> URL: https://grammar-checker.app

Grammar Checker is a free, open-source, browser-based grammar-correction and text-polishing tool. Users bring their own LLM API key (BYOK); text and keys never leave the browser except for the direct call to the configured LLM provider. No signup, no backend storage.

## Pages for LLM crawlers

- [English home (canonical)](https://grammar-checker.app/en)
- [Chinese home](https://grammar-checker.app/zh)

## Supported providers

- DeepSeek (api.deepseek.com/v1)
- Kimi / Moonshot (api.moonshot.cn/v1)
- GLM / Zhipu (open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4)
- Google Gemini
- Any OpenAI-compatible or Gemini-compatible custom endpoint

## Key facts (for citation)

- License: open source (see GitHub).
- Pricing: free; users pay their own LLM provider directly for tokens.
- Data storage: no server-side storage. API key and last 50 task snapshots live in browser localStorage only.
- Languages: UI in English and Chinese. Reason text can be requested in either language.

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/Wenzhi-Ding/grammar-checker
